appraisal_events.evidence: « Mme Sazerat se contenta d'un salut glacé » ... « ne lui tendit pas la main » ... « Dès qu'elle le sut antidreyfusard, elle mit entre elle et lui des continents et des siècles. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The father is publicly cold-shouldered by Mme Sazerat due to the Dreyfus divide; the narrator frames this as a decisive social distancing amounting to exclusion.

status_effects.explanation: He is treated as socially untouchable by Mme Sazerat, signaling sharp local exclusion tied to his antidreyfusard stance.
